other_observers: Steve Stachoviak, Cole Wild; Cole Wild originally reported this bird on 6/08/2010. It was seen by many observers over several days.
specific_location: "Norma's Grove" on CR 100 less than 10 miles west of Crow Valley Campground
description: cuckoo shaped bird, pale brown on upperparts with black eye and bill, red iris, whitish on underparts with pale buffy throat and upper chest; black and white markings under the tail; in flight, a hint of brighter reddish-brown in some flight feathers.Behaviors: Sitting quietly and motionless on tree limbs, but moving frequently between trees, sometimes flying low to perch on fenceline or tall weeds.Call: nonePlumage: SY
photographer: Photographer: Nick Komar, Nick Komar, Nick Komar
